stemHtml: You are approaching your destination aerodrome, but due to a delay, ATC has requested you to hold. You want to perform the hold at the maximum endurance speed. As you are flying a jet, which speed should you use?

options.a: VMD, and there is no effect of wind on this speed.
options.b: VMP, and there is no effect of wind on this speed.
options.c: Fly faster than VMD on the outbound leg and slower on the inbound leg.
options.d: Fly slower than VMD on the inbound leg and faster on the outbound leg.
